verbatim_quote: Many people think that, okay, so they understand things like we do, they can reason like we do, not quite as well yet, but they're getting there. They tell fibs like we do.
gloss: [ANALOGY] Many people think that, okay, so they understand things like we do, they can reason like we do, not quite as well yet, but they're getting there. They tell fibs like we do.
